summary: Closed SIM-005 after PR #22 merged into main. The reviewed Save Envelope v1 DTO/codec, structured save/load rejection path, M1 golden save fixture, Node/Worker save-load canary, and 3650-day save/load performance baseline are integrated at main merge commit 021c2545438af71455547abf9761cf671f39c280. All SIM-* M1 implementation tasks are now CLOSED and no dependency-ready M1 task remains.

tests_run.result: PR #22 MERGED at 2026-06-24T10:16:25Z with merge commit 021c2545438af71455547abf9761cf671f39c280; Quality/Web and Windows Desktop Smoke checks both succeeded.
SIM-005 merge commit is an ancestor of origin/main.
SIM-005 is CLOSED; SIM-001 through SIM-006 are all CLOSED.
No dependency-ready M1 task is listed.

decisions: Close SIM-005 only after confirming the accepted implementation entered origin/main through PR #22.
Do not start a new implementation task in this closure commit; the next step is M1 milestone exit validation because all SIM-* M1 implementation tasks are CLOSED.
risks: M1 milestone exit still needs explicit acceptance-matrix validation before entering the next milestone, even though product-owner policy allows M1-M4 ordinary milestone exits to pass autonomously when evidence is sufficient and no R4 stop condition is active.
requested_action: After this closure commit is integrated, run M1 milestone exit validation rather than starting another M1 implementation task.
